sources.name: CourtListener (Free Law Project)
sources.coverage: U.S. federal and state court opinions (millions of cases, including Supreme Court and lower courts)【3†L62-L65】
sources.access: Open API and bulk CSV downloads via CourtListener website; supports developer API and search
sources.format: CSV, JSON (via API); opinions in text (OCR of PDF) and metadata
sources.license: Public domain (U.S. court opinions)【3†L62-L65】; CourtListener data is CC0

sources.name: GovInfo (GPO)
sources.coverage: Federal court opinions (USCOURTS collection), U.S. Code, Code of Federal Regulations, Federal Register, etc.
sources.access: REST API (api.govinfo.gov) and Bulk Data repository (sitemaps available)【16†L445-L450】【23†L159-L166】

sources.name: Office of Law Revision Counsel (U.S. Code)
sources.coverage: Entire United States Code (updated through latest Public Law)【19†L142-L149】
sources.access: Direct download of XML/XHTML/PDF for each title via uscode.house.gov【19†L146-L154】【19†L158-L160】

sources.name: GPO Bulk Data (eCFR/CFR)
sources.coverage: Code of Federal Regulations (eCFR, CFR) and Federal Register (since 1994)
sources.access: Bulk XML downloads from GPO (eCFR XML)【20†L43-L47】 and GovInfo API

sources.name: National Archives Find Case Law API
sources.coverage: UK court judgments and tribunal decisions (Supreme Court, Court of Appeal, High Court, etc.)
sources.license: Open Justice Licence (allows reuse with attribution; requires permission for bulk automated analysis)【29†L40-L48】

sources.name: Legislation.gov.uk API
sources.coverage: United Kingdom primary and secondary legislation (Acts, SIs)
sources.access: REST API providing XML/HTML/RDF content (append .xml for raw data)【27†L65-L73】

sources.name: BAILII (British & Irish Legal Information Institute)
sources.coverage: UK and Irish case law (Supreme Court, Court of Appeal, High Court, etc.)
sources.license: Crown copyright (judgments) and BAILII copyright on presentation; bulk scraping is prohibited【31†L201-L205】

sources.name: EUR-Lex / EU Cellar API
sources.coverage: EU treaties, legislation (regulations, directives, decisions), and Court of Justice case-law
sources.access: RESTful web services (SPARQL/Cellar API) and bulk data dumps for CELEX data【33†L248-L256】【33†L279-L287】
sources.format: XML (Formex for Official Journal, XML for directives/regs, HTML, PDF)
sources.license: Reuse free of charge under EU terms (EUR-Lex content copyright applies)【33†L233-L240】

sources.name: Curia (CJEU case-law database)
sources.coverage: Court of Justice and General Court judgments, opinions, orders

sources.name: EU Open Data Portal (data.europa.eu)
sources.coverage: Official Journal listings (L/C series), EU institutions data
sources.access: CSV/JSON/ODK downloads of metadata (OJ issue lists) linking to XML documents【33†L258-L266】

sources.name: AWS Open Data – Indian Supreme Court Judgments
sources.coverage: Supreme Court of India judgments (1950–2025, ~88,000 cases)【63†L26-L34】
sources.access: Public S3 bucket (aws s3 ls without credentials)【63†L26-L34】
sources.format: Zip of PDF judgments (English & regional languages), JSON metadata, Parquet structured data【63†L26-L34】【63†L36-L38】

sources.name: India Code (legislative repository)
sources.coverage: All Central and State Acts, and subordinate legislation (in force)
sources.access: Official website with searchable PDFs of statutes【70†L82-L89】

sources.name: E-Gazette of India
sources.coverage: Official Gazette (notifications of laws, rules, amendments)

sources.name: Official Legal Information Portal (pravo.gov.ru)
sources.coverage: Federal legislation (laws, codes, presidential decrees, etc.) in Russian
sources.license: Government documents (use subject to Russian law)

sources.name: Supreme Court of the Russian Federation
sources.coverage: Supreme Court rulings and Plenum resolutions (in Russian)

sources.name: Constitutional Court of the Russian Federation
sources.coverage: Constitutional Court judgments (in Russian, some English summaries)

sources.name: Supreme Court of Israel (court.gov.il)
sources.coverage: Supreme Court decisions (Hebrew original, some English translations)

sources.name: Israeli Supreme Court Database (ISCD)
sources.coverage: Structured database of Israeli Supreme Court decisions (2010–2018, ~16K cases)【54†L47-L54】

sources.name: International Court of Justice (ICJ)
sources.coverage: All ICJ judgments and advisory opinions (1947–present)

sources.name: CD-ICJ (Corpus of Decisions: ICJ)
sources.coverage: All published ICJ decisions (judgments, opinions, dissents)【39†L37-L44】

sources.name: UN Treaty Collection
sources.coverage: Multilateral treaties registered with the UN (status, texts)
sources.access: UNTC website (search by treaty or country)

sources.name: Avalon Project (Yale Law School)
sources.coverage: Major historical treaties and documents (e.g. NATO Treaty 1949, Warsaw Pact 1955)
